creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
Even thought if you don't have this problem anymore. I rather to keep this  
PR open until we fix bsd.gecko.mk correct for firefox3 since it does not  
install *.pc files. It needs some check on if it is firefox3 then do not  
try to copy the *.pc files.

Cheers,
Mezz
